query:
-- Total vehicle statistics
SELECT 
  'Total Vehicles' as metric,
  COUNT(*) as value
FROM vehicles
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Distinct Brands',
  COUNT(DISTINCT brand)
FROM vehicles
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Distinct Models',
  COUNT(DISTINCT model)
FROM vehicles
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Distinct Engine Codes',
  COUNT(DISTINCT engineCode)
FROM vehicles
ORDER BY metric;

-- Top 20 brands
SELECT 
  brand,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles), 2) as percentage
FROM vehicles
GROUP BY brand
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
